hero.heading: Mortgage Broker in Brooklyn, NY
hero.subheading: Local Brooklyn mortgage experts for home purchase, refinance, first-time buyers, and specialty loans — from our Coney Island Avenue office.

intro.heading: Brooklyn’s local mortgage broker for real buyers & homeowners
paragraphs: If you searched for a mortgage broker in Brooklyn, mortgage broker near me, or home loans in Brooklyn NY, you are in the right place. Green Street Capital is headquartered at 2709 Coney Island Ave and helps buyers and homeowners finance across southern Brooklyn and the entire borough.

Brooklyn neighborhoods differ: co-ops in Park Slope, multi-families in Bensonhurst, condos near the waterfront, and competitive bidding in Williamsburg. We match conventional, FHA, VA, jumbo, bank statement, and Non-QM programs to how you actually earn and buy.
As an independent mortgage broker (NMLS #2066586), we compare multiple lenders instead of locking you into one bank’s menu — often the difference between “denied elsewhere” and a clear path to close.
bullets: First-time homebuyers shopping Brooklyn brownstones, condos & co-ops
Families buying 2–4 family homes with rental income
Self-employed & 1099 Brooklyn professionals needing bank statement loans
Homeowners refinancing to lower rate or cash-out equity
Investors financing Brooklyn rentals and multi-units
Buyers who need a mortgage broker near Sheepshead Bay, Bay Ridge, or Midwood

market.heading: Buying or refinancing in Brooklyn right now
paragraphs: Brooklyn inventory, board timelines, and multi-family underwriting can slow closings. A complete pre-approval from a local mortgage broker in Brooklyn NY helps you write stronger offers.
Property taxes, insurance, and maintenance fees vary by neighborhood — we help you model the full monthly payment, not just principal and interest, before you stretch your budget.
Whether you searched “best mortgage broker Brooklyn” or “FHA loan Brooklyn first time buyer,” start with a free consult and we will map realistic program options.

faqs.question: Who is the best mortgage broker in Brooklyn NY?
faqs.answer: “Best” depends on your situation. Green Street Capital is a licensed Brooklyn-based mortgage broker (NMLS #2066586) known for purchase, refinance, and specialty loans — with a local office on Coney Island Ave and access to multiple lenders.

faqs.question: Do you offer mortgages near me in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our headquarters is in Brooklyn and we work with buyers and homeowners across the borough, including Sheepshead Bay, Bay Ridge, Midwood, Bensonhurst, Park Slope, and beyond.

faqs.question: Where is Green Street Capital’s Brooklyn office?
faqs.answer: 2709 Coney Island Ave, 3rd Floor, Brooklyn, NY 11235. Phone 718-615-4545.

faqs.question: Can first-time homebuyers get a mortgage in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes. We regularly help first-time buyers with FHA, conventional low-down-payment, and other programs, plus guidance on reserves, gift funds, and competitive pre-approvals.

faqs.question: Do you refinance mortgages in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes. We review rate-and-term and cash-out refinance options when equity, credit, and income support a refinance.

faqs.question: Can self-employed people get a home loan in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Often yes. Many self-employed and 1099 borrowers use bank statement or Non-QM programs when standard W-2 underwriting does not reflect real cash flow.

faqs.question: Do you finance co-ops and condos in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes. We help structure financing for co-ops and condos and prepare documentation lenders and boards typically expect.

faqs.question: How do I start with a Brooklyn mortgage broker?
faqs.answer: Schedule a free 15-minute call, call 718-615-4545, or choose a loan officer on our Team page to apply.
